debug_info.goal:
r : ℝ
f : ℂ → ℂ
h : MeromorphicOn f ⊤
a : ℝ
⊢ MeromorphicOn (fun x => f (circleMap 0 r a) - circleMap 0 1 x) (uIcc 0 (2 * Real.pi))

proof:
have hf : MeromorphicAt (fun x : ℂ ↦ f x) (circleMap 0 r a) := by
        simpa using h (circleMap 0 r a) trivial
      have hconst : MeromorphicOn (fun _ : ℝ ↦ f (circleMap 0 r a)) (uIcc 0 (2 * π)) := by
        intro x hx
        simpa [Function.comp] using hf.comp_analyticAt (analyticAt_const : AnalyticAt ℝ (fun _ : ℝ ↦ circleMap 0 r a) x)
      have hcircle : MeromorphicOn (fun x : ℝ ↦ circleMap 0 1 x) (uIcc 0 (2 * π)) := by
        intro x hx
        refine AnalyticAt.meromorphicAt ?_
        have hc := analyticOnNhd_circleMap (0 : ℂ) (1 : ℝ)
        exact hc x trivial
      exact hconst.sub hcircle
failed_attempts:
have hf' : MeromorphicAt f (circleMap 0 r a) := h (circleMap 0 r a) trivial
      have hconst : MeromorphicOn (fun _ : ℂ ↦ f (circleMap 0 r a)) (uIcc 0 (2 * π) : Set ℂ) := by
        intro z hz
        simpa using hf'.comp_meromorphicAt (meromorphicAt_const : MeromorphicAt (fun _ : ℂ ↦ z) z)
      have hcircle : MeromorphicOn (fun x : ℂ ↦ circleMap 0 1 x) (uIcc 0 (2 * π) : Set ℂ) := by
        intro z hz
        exact (analyticOnNhd_circleMap 0 1 z trivial).meromorphicAt
      simpa [sub_eq_add_neg] using hconst.add hcircle.neg

refine (h (circleMap 0 r a) trivial).sub ?_
      refine (analyticOnNhd_circleMap 0 1).meromorphicOn

refine (h (circleMap 0 r a) trivial).sub ?_
      refine (AnalyticOnNhd.meromorphicOn ?_).mono ?_
      · exact analyticOnNhd_circleMap 0 1
      · intro x hx
        exact trivial

have hf : MeromorphicAt f (circleMap 0 r a) := h (circleMap 0 r a) trivial
      have hconst : MeromorphicOn (fun _ : ℂ ↦ f (circleMap 0 r a)) (uIcc 0 (2 * π)) := by
        intro z hz
        simpa using hf.meromorphicAt.comp z (by
          simpa [circleMap] using analyticAt_const)
      have hcircle : MeromorphicOn (fun x : ℂ ↦ circleMap 0 1 x) (uIcc 0 (2 * π)) := by
        intro z hz
        exact (analyticOnNhd_circleMap 0 1 z trivial).meromorphicAt
      simpa [MeromorphicOn] using hconst.sub hcircle

have hf : MeromorphicAt (fun _ : ℂ ↦ f (circleMap 0 r a)) := by
        intro z
        simpa using (h (circleMap 0 r a) trivial)
      have hg : AnalyticOnNhd ℂ (circleMap (0 : ℂ) 1) (uIcc 0 (2 * π)) := by
        simpa using (analyticOnNhd_circleMap (0 : ℂ) (1 : ℝ))
      refine (hf.meromorphicOn.sub ?_)
      exact (hg.meromorphicOn (s := uIcc 0 (2 * π)))

refine (MeromorphicOn.const_sub ?_)
      intro x hx
      refine AnalyticAt.meromorphicAt ?_
      have hc := analyticOnNhd_circleMap 0 1
      exact (hc x trivial)

have hfconst : MeromorphicOn (fun _ : ℝ ↦ f (circleMap 0 r a)) (uIcc 0 (2 * π)) := by
        exact meromorphicOn_const
      have hcircle : MeromorphicOn (fun x : ℝ ↦ circleMap 0 1 x) (uIcc 0 (2 * π)) := by
        exact (analyticOnNhd_circleMap 0 1).meromorphicOn
      simpa using hfconst.sub hcircle

have hf_const : MeromorphicOn (fun _ : ℂ ↦ f (circleMap 0 r a)) (uIcc 0 (2 * π)) := by
        intro z hz
        simpa using (h (circleMap 0 r a) trivial)
      have hg : MeromorphicOn (fun x : ℂ ↦ circleMap 0 1 x) (uIcc 0 (2 * π)) := by
        intro z hz
        exact (analyticOnNhd_circleMap 0 (1 : ℝ) z trivial).meromorphicAt
      simpa [sub_eq_add_neg] using hf_const.add hg.neg

have hf_const : MeromorphicOn (fun _ : ℝ ↦ f (circleMap 0 r a)) (uIcc 0 (2 * π)) := by
        exact meromorphicOn_const
      have hg : MeromorphicOn (fun x : ℝ ↦ circleMap 0 1 x) (uIcc 0 (2 * π)) := by
        exact (analyticOnNhd_circleMap 0 1).meromorphicOn
      simpa [sub_eq_add_neg] using hf_const.add hg.neg

refine (MeromorphicOn.const ?_).sub ?_
      · exact h (circleMap 0 r a) trivial
      · refine (AnalyticOnNhd.meromorphicOn ?_)
        simpa [Set.mapsTo_univ] using (analyticOnNhd_circleMap 0 (1 : ℝ))

have hfconst : MeromorphicOn (fun _ : ℝ ↦ f (circleMap 0 r a)) (uIcc 0 (2 * π)) := by
        fun_prop
      have hcircle : MeromorphicOn (fun x : ℝ ↦ circleMap 0 1 x) (uIcc 0 (2 * π)) := by
        intro x hx
        refine AnalyticAt.meromorphicAt ?_
        have hc := analyticOnNhd_circleMap 0 (1 : ℝ)
        exact (hc x trivial)
      exact hfconst.sub hcircle

have hf : MeromorphicAt (fun _ : ℂ ↦ f (circleMap 0 r a)) := by
        have : MeromorphicAt f (circleMap 0 r a) := h (circleMap 0 r a) trivial
        simpa [MeromorphicAt, Function.comp] using this.comp_analyticAt (by fun_prop)
      have hg : MeromorphicOn (fun x : ℂ ↦ circleMap 0 1 x) (uIcc 0 (2 * π)) := by
        intro x hx
        refine AnalyticAt.meromorphicAt ?_
        have := analyticOnNhd_circleMap 0 (1 : ℝ)
        exact this x trivial
      have hf' : MeromorphicOn (fun _ : ℂ ↦ f (circleMap 0 r a)) (uIcc 0 (2 * π)) := by
        intro x hx
        simpa using hf
      simpa [sub_eq_add_neg] using hf'.add hg.neg

have hf : MeromorphicAt (fun _ : ℝ ↦ f (circleMap 0 r a)) := by
        intro z
        refine (h (circleMap 0 r a) trivial).comp_analyticAt ?_
        have hc := analyticOnNhd_circleMap (0:ℂ) r
        exact hc a trivial
      have hg : MeromorphicOn (fun x : ℝ ↦ circleMap 0 1 x) (uIcc 0 (2 * π)) := by
        intro x hx
        refine AnalyticAt.meromorphicAt ?_
        have hc := analyticOnNhd_circleMap (0:ℂ) 1
        exact hc x trivial
      exact (hf.meromorphicOn.sub hg)

have hf : MeromorphicAt (fun _ : ℝ ↦ f (circleMap 0 r a)) := by
        have : MeromorphicAt f (circleMap 0 r a) := h (circleMap 0 r a) trivial
        exact this.comp_analyticAt (by
          have := analyticOnNhd_const
          simpa using (this a trivial))
      have hg : MeromorphicOn (fun x : ℝ ↦ circleMap 0 1 x) (uIcc 0 (2 * π)) := by
        intro x hx
        refine AnalyticAt.meromorphicAt ?_
        have := analyticOnNhd_circleMap (0 : ℂ) (1 : ℝ)
        exact this x trivial
      exact (MeromorphicOn.const_sub hg).congr (by
        intro x hx
        rfl)
    exact z₀

have hf : MeromorphicAt f (circleMap 0 r a) := by
        simpa using (h (circleMap 0 r a) trivial)
      have hconst : MeromorphicOn (fun _ : ℝ ↦ f (circleMap 0 r a)) (uIcc 0 (2 * π)) := by
        intro x hx
        simpa using hf.comp_meromorphicAt meromorphicAt_const
      have hcircle : MeromorphicOn (fun x : ℝ ↦ circleMap 0 1 x) (uIcc 0 (2 * π)) := by
        intro x hx
        exact (analyticAt_circleMap (z := (0 : ℂ)) (R := (1 : ℝ))).meromorphicAt
      exact hconst.sub hcircle

refine (MeromorphicOn.const.sub ?_)
      refine AnalyticOnNhd.meromorphicOn ?_
      simpa using (analyticOnNhd_circleMap 0 1).mono (by intro x hx; trivial)

have hfconst : MeromorphicOn (fun _ : ℂ ↦ f (circleMap 0 r a)) (uIcc (0 : ℝ) (2 * π)) := by
        simpa [MeromorphicOn] using (meromorphicOn_const : MeromorphicOn (fun _ : ℂ ↦ f (circleMap 0 r a)) (uIcc (0 : ℝ) (2 * π)))
      have hcircle : MeromorphicOn (fun x : ℂ ↦ circleMap 0 1 x) (uIcc (0 : ℝ) (2 * π)) := by
        intro x hx
        refine AnalyticAt.meromorphicAt ?_
        have hc := analyticOnNhd_circleMap 0 (1 : ℝ)
        exact (hc x trivial)
      simpa [sub_eq_add_neg] using hfconst.sub hcircle

refine ( (h (circleMap 0 r a) trivial).meromorphicAt.sub ?_ ).meromorphicOn
      · intro x hx
        refine AnalyticAt.meromorphicAt ?_
        have hc := analyticOnNhd_circleMap 0 1
        exact (hc x trivial)

refine (h (circleMap 0 r a) trivial).const_sub ?_
      exact (analyticOnNhd_circleMap 0 1).meromorphicOn

have hf : MeromorphicAt (fun _ : ℂ => f (circleMap 0 r a)) := by
        have : MeromorphicAt f (circleMap 0 r a) := h (circleMap 0 r a) trivial
        simpa [MeromorphicAt] using this.const
      have hg : MeromorphicOn (fun x : ℝ ↦ circleMap 0 1 x) (uIcc 0 (2 * π)) := by
        intro x hx
        refine AnalyticAt.meromorphicAt ?_
        have hc := analyticOnNhd_circleMap (0 : ℂ) (1 : ℝ)
        exact (hc x trivial)
      exact hf.meromorphicOn.sub hg

have hfconst : MeromorphicOn (fun _ : ℝ ↦ f (circleMap 0 r a)) (uIcc 0 (2 * π)) := by
        intro x hx
        simpa using ((h (circleMap 0 r a) trivial).comp_analyticAt (by
          have := analyticOnNhd_const (c := a : ℝ)
          exact this x trivial))
      have hcircle : MeromorphicOn (fun x : ℝ ↦ circleMap 0 1 x) (uIcc 0 (2 * π)) := by
        intro x hx
        refine AnalyticAt.meromorphicAt ?_
        have := analyticOnNhd_circleMap 0 (1 : ℝ)
        exact this x trivial
      exact hfconst.sub hcircle

refine (meromorphicOn_const.sub ?_)
      refine AnalyticOnNhd.meromorphicOn ?_
      exact analyticOnNhd_circleMap 0 1

have hfconst : MeromorphicOn (fun _ : ℝ ↦ f (circleMap 0 r a)) (uIcc 0 (2 * π)) := by
        fun_prop
      have hcircle : MeromorphicOn (fun x : ℝ ↦ circleMap 0 1 x) (uIcc 0 (2 * π)) := by
        intro x hx
        exact (analyticOnNhd_circleMap 0 1 x trivial).meromorphicAt.meromorphicWithinAt
      simpa [sub_eq_add_neg] using hfconst.sub hcircle

have hfconst : MeromorphicOn (fun _ : ℂ ↦ f (circleMap 0 r a)) (uIcc 0 (2 * π)) := by
        exact meromorphicOn_const
      have hcircle : MeromorphicOn (fun x : ℂ ↦ circleMap 0 1 x) (uIcc 0 (2 * π)) := by
        intro z hz
        exact (analyticOnNhd_circleMap 0 1 z trivial).meromorphicAt
      simpa [sub_eq_add_neg] using hfconst.add hcircle.neg

have hf : MeromorphicAt f (circleMap 0 r a) := h (circleMap 0 r a) trivial
      have hconst : MeromorphicOn (fun _ : ℝ ↦ f (circleMap 0 r a)) (uIcc 0 (2 * π)) := by
        intro x hx
        simpa using hf
      have hcircle : MeromorphicOn (fun x : ℝ ↦ circleMap 0 1 x) (uIcc 0 (2 * π)) := by
        intro x hx
        exact (analyticAt_circleMap 0 1 x).meromorphicAt
      exact hconst.sub hcircle
successful_attempts:
have hf : MeromorphicAt (fun x : ℂ ↦ f x) (circleMap 0 r a) := by
        simpa using h (circleMap 0 r a) trivial
      have hconst : MeromorphicOn (fun _ : ℝ ↦ f (circleMap 0 r a)) (uIcc 0 (2 * π)) := by
        intro x hx
        simpa [Function.comp] using hf.comp_analyticAt (analyticAt_const : AnalyticAt ℝ (fun _ : ℝ ↦ circleMap 0 r a) x)
      have hcircle : MeromorphicOn (fun x : ℝ ↦ circleMap 0 1 x) (uIcc 0 (2 * π)) := by
        intro x hx
        refine AnalyticAt.meromorphicAt ?_
        have hc := analyticOnNhd_circleMap (0 : ℂ) (1 : ℝ)
        exact hc x trivial
      exact hconst.sub hcircle

have hf : MeromorphicAt f (circleMap 0 r a) := h (circleMap 0 r a) trivial
      have hconst : MeromorphicOn (fun _ : ℝ ↦ f (circleMap 0 r a)) (uIcc 0 (2 * π)) := by
        intro x hx
        simpa using hf
      have hcircle : MeromorphicOn (fun x : ℝ ↦ circleMap 0 1 x) (uIcc 0 (2 * π)) := by
        intro x hx
        refine AnalyticAt.meromorphicAt ?_
        have hc := analyticOnNhd_circleMap 0 (1 : ℝ)
        exact hc x trivial
      exact hconst.sub hcircle

have hf : MeromorphicOn (fun _ : ℝ ↦ f (circleMap 0 r a)) (uIcc 0 (2 * π)) := by
        intro x hx
        simpa using (h (circleMap 0 r a) trivial)
      have hg : MeromorphicOn (fun x : ℝ ↦ circleMap 0 1 x) (uIcc 0 (2 * π)) := by
        intro x hx
        refine AnalyticAt.meromorphicAt ?_
        have hc := analyticOnNhd_circleMap 0 (1 : ℝ)
        exact hc x trivial
      exact hf.sub hg

have hfconst : MeromorphicOn (fun _ : ℝ ↦ f (circleMap 0 r a)) (uIcc 0 (2 * π)) := by
        intro x hx
        simpa using (h (circleMap 0 r a) trivial).comp_analyticAt (by fun_prop)
      have hcircle : MeromorphicOn (fun x : ℝ ↦ circleMap 0 1 x) (uIcc 0 (2 * π)) := by
        intro x hx
        exact (AnalyticAt.meromorphicAt (by
          have := analyticOnNhd_circleMap 0 1
          exact this x trivial))
      exact hfconst.sub hcircle

have hf : MeromorphicAt f (circleMap 0 r a) := h (circleMap 0 r a) trivial
      have hconst : MeromorphicOn (fun _ : ℝ ↦ f (circleMap 0 r a)) (uIcc 0 (2 * π)) := by
        simpa [MeromorphicOn] using fun x hx ↦ hf
      have hcircle : MeromorphicOn (fun x : ℝ ↦ circleMap 0 1 x) (uIcc 0 (2 * π)) := by
        intro x hx
        exact (analyticOnNhd_circleMap 0 (1 : ℝ) x trivial).meromorphicAt
      exact hconst.sub hcircle

have hf : MeromorphicOn (fun _ : ℝ ↦ f (circleMap 0 r a)) (uIcc 0 (2 * π)) := by
        intro x hx
        simpa using (h (circleMap 0 r a) trivial)
      have hg : MeromorphicOn (fun x : ℝ ↦ circleMap 0 1 x) (uIcc 0 (2 * π)) := by
        intro x hx
        refine AnalyticAt.meromorphicAt ?_
        have := analyticOnNhd_circleMap 0 (1 : ℝ)
        exact this x trivial
      simpa [sub_eq_add_neg] using hf.add hg.neg

have hfconst : MeromorphicOn (fun _ : ℝ ↦ f (circleMap 0 r a)) (uIcc 0 (2 * π)) := by
        intro x hx
        simpa using (h (circleMap 0 r a) trivial).comp_analyticAt (by
          have := analyticOnNhd_circleMap 0 r
          exact this a trivial)
      have hcircle : MeromorphicOn (fun x : ℝ ↦ circleMap 0 1 x) (uIcc 0 (2 * π)) := by
        intro x hx
        refine AnalyticAt.meromorphicAt ?_
        have := analyticOnNhd_circleMap 0 1
        exact this x trivial
      exact hfconst.sub hcircle
